steps.title: Read the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts commentators who lauded ideological blogs with observers who warned that those blogs worsened polarization. The blank must describe observers who were less optimistic about the development.

steps.title: Choose the optimism term
steps.content: B means stubbornly resistant, C means hating people, and D means sincere. "Sanguine" means optimistic or hopeful, so "less sanguine" correctly describes the skeptical observers. The answer is A.
